DEFENDANTS CARLSON YEE, SHIRLEY LI, S AND C COMPANY LLC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: S AND C COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS ALL CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION GIVING RISE TO LIABILITY OF THIS DEFENDANT. DEMURRER BY OTHER DEFENDANTS IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CONSUMER LEGAL REMEDIES ACT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR QUIET TITLE FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE RETURN OF VALUE RECEIVED (EQUITY) AS PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT THE TRANSACTION, INCLUDING DEED IS VOIDABLE, REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO ACT EQUITABLY PER FLEMING V. KAGAN (1961) 189 CAL.APP.2D 791. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. ALLEGATIONS FOR THE PURPOSES OF DEMURRER MUST BE TAKEN AS TRUE. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON, CLERK: R. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS CARLSON YEE, SHIRLEY LI'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) showing that Plaintiff may do equity as required by Fleming v. Kagan (1961) 189 Cal.App.2d 791. For example, state facts showing that Plaintiff qualified for a mortgage and/or reverse mortgage; there is sufficient equity in the property; Plaintiff has sufficient income to service the mortgage, etc. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CARLSON YEE, SHIRLEY LI, S AND C COMPANY LLC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: S and C Company, LLC's Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as all causes of action to allege facts in support of each cause of action giving rise to liability of this defendant. Demurrer by other defendants is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for violation of Consumer Legal Remedies Act. No opposition filed. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for quiet title for plaintiff to allege return of value received (equity) as Plaintiff alleges that the transaction, including deed is voidable, requiring Plaintiff to act equitably per Fleming v. Kagan (1961) 189 Cal.App.2d 791. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. All other causes of action are sufficiently alleged. Allegations for the purposes of demurrer must be taken as true. Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: R. Wong, Not Reported (D501)
